title: verbascum carduchorum
intro: Verbascum carduchorum, also known as the Carduchorum mullein or wild mullein, is a flowering plant species in the mullein genus Verbascum, belonging to the figwort family Scrophulariaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which are attributed to its high content of iridoid glycosides and saponins. The health benefits of Verbascum carduchorum include its potential to soothe respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce swelling and pain. Verbascum carduchorum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for various applications in natural remedies.
